---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact OptoLAB at the University of Modena and Reggio Emilia."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/contact.html"
---

## Start a research conversation

OptoLAB welcomes enquiries about scientific collaboration, technology development, student projects and shared research questions in biomedical optics and instrumentation.

::: {.contact-panel}
::: {.contact-primary}
### OptoLAB

**University of Modena and Reggio Emilia**

[Visit the OPTOLAB-UNIMORE GitHub organization](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE)
:::

::: {.contact-details}
**Department**  
To be verified

**Institutional address**  
To be verified

**Institutional email**  
To be verified

**Map**  
To be added after the address is verified
:::
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
Contact details must be verified before public communication. No email address, telephone number or physical location has been inferred.
:::
